name: Context Compression
description: Reduces the length of prompts or retrieved context to fit token limits while preserving semantic content, using techniques such as selective token removal, summarization, or token-classification-based pruning (e.g. LLMLingua).

evidence.notes: LLMLingua-2 (ACL 2024 Findings) — data-distillation for efficient task-agnostic prompt compression; 3x-6x speed-up, BERT-base token classifier; demonstrates measurable perplexity-based faithfulness.
Microsoft LLMLingua — reproducible open-source implementation of LLMLingua-1/2/LongLLMLingua; CI, README, Apache-2.0 license.
SkillsMP top hit: sickn33/antigravity-awesome-skills (35k+ stars), multiple community variants including context-compression-v2.
